g.onclick: sendPrompt('Who are the clients of the sage-brain APIs?')
sendPrompt('How does SageMaker Studio connect to Neptune?')
sendPrompt('Who uploads RDF data to S3 in sage-brain-infra?')
sendPrompt('How is the Agent API Gateway configured?')
sendPrompt('What does the agent submit Lambda do?')
sendPrompt('Why is the agent SQS visibility timeout 360s?')
sendPrompt('What does the Strands agent worker Lambda do?')
sendPrompt('How is DynamoDB used as the agent job store?')
sendPrompt('What Bedrock model does the agent use?')
sendPrompt('How is the Query API Gateway configured?')
sendPrompt('What does the query submit Lambda do?')
sendPrompt('Why does the query SQS queue have a 90s visibility timeout?')
sendPrompt('What does the SPARQL query worker Lambda do?')
sendPrompt('How is DynamoDB used as the query job store?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Neptune cluster config in neptune_stack.py')
sendPrompt('How is the S3 bucket used for Neptune bulk loading?')
sendPrompt('What does the MonitoringStack cover in sage-brain-infra?')
